name: Strawberries Dipped in Chocolate and Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 1 quart large strawberries (unhulled), rinsed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a bowl over hot water or using microwave melting instructions on the package.
2. Turn the biscotti into crumbs by placing it in a heavy-duty plastic bag and crushing with a rolling pin.
3. Hold onto the hull, dip each berry into the melted chocolate to cover half the berry.
4. Then dip into the crumbs.
5. Set on a sheet of waxed paper until the chocolate is firm.
